# v1.1.2 release notes

The dashboard install button is gone again. The external-drive setup path remains available from the terminal.

## What's new

- Removed the dashboard footer button for the external-drive install path.
- Kept the advanced terminal installer available as `sudo ai-os-install-to-disk`.
- Updated the README, Getting Started guide, and changelogs so they match the current UI and removable-media workflow.

## For users updating from v1.1.x

Use Update OS as usual after this tagged release is published.

## Verify download

```sh
sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS
```

You want to see `OK` next to the ISO name.
